high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall allow access to new surface transportation-related environmental data.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The CAS shall allow access to new surface transportation-related environmental data by providing configuration capabilities.
The CS shall allow access to new surface transportation-related environmental data by collecting it from data sources.

The EMS shall allow access to new surface transportation-related environmental data by exposing its metadata for discovery.
The QEDC shall allow access to new surface transportation-related environmental data by storing qualified instances.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall record statistics about its operation.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The CAS shall record the timestamp of each system start-up event.

The CAS shall record the total number of errors encountered during operation.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall be able to disseminate data based on spatial queries.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall enable environmental data queries by timestamp.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall enable environmental data queries by timestamp.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall enable environmental data queries by location reference.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall accept location reference as a query parameter.
The QEDS shall retrieve environmental data associated with the provided location reference.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall enable environmental data queries by quality.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall provide a query interface that allows clients to request environmental data filtered by quality criteria.
The QEDS shall accept query parameters that specify quality attributes such as quality level, quality flag, or quality score.
The QEDS shall retrieve and return environmental data records that satisfy the provided quality criteria.
The QEDS shall include quality metadata for each returned record to verify compliance with the query criteria.
The QEDS shall return an empty result set or appropriate indicator when no environmental data meets the specified quality criteria.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall enable environmental data queries by source.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall provide a query interface that includes a source filter parameter.
The QEDS shall process a query containing a source identifier and return environmental data records associated with that source.
The QEDS shall return an empty result set when no environmental data exists for the specified source.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall allow users to create a data subscription request.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall provide a capability for users to initiate a data subscription request creation.
The QEDS shall accept user-provided subscription request details.
The QEDS shall validate that all required subscription request details are provided.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall be able to publish new data within twenty minutes of data receipt.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall be able to publish new data within twenty minutes of data receipt.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QEDS shall be able to handle three hundred simultaneous requests for environmental data.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall detect out of range values.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QChS shall detect out-of-range values in environmental data.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QChS shall not modify original observations.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QChS shall be able to implement quality checking spatial tests using available data.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall be able to base its quality checking process on values from multiple observations.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QChS shall be able to retrieve values from multiple observations.
The QChS shall be able to aggregate values from multiple observations.

high_level_requirement: The Clarus system shall be able to base its quality checking process on values distributed in time.

low_level_requirements.requirement: The QChS shall be able to accept values with associated timestamps for quality checking.
The QChS shall be able to process values in chronological order for quality checking.
